positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene where bioluminescent flora and deep-sea glowing elements mingle. Central composition featuring stylized, abstract mountain peaks forming a crescent moon shape. Overlaid are geometric glowing pathways and subtle star constellations. The style must be hyper-detailed vector illustration combined with nebula gradients, utilizing a limited, high-contrast palette of deep indigo, emerald green, cyan, and luminous gold. Focus on strong, clean silhouettes and smooth, scalable gradients suitable for apparel print art. Perfect symmetry and visual balance.
negative: text, words, letters, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, out of focus, low resolution, artifact, grainy, poor composition, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs
